string.text: A magazine for the VPO-101 and compatible systems, manufactured by Molot, with a capacity of 5 rounds of 7.62x51 caliber.
A magazine for the VPO-101 and compatible systems, manufactured by Molot, with a capacity of 10 rounds of 7.62x51 caliber.
A rechambered magazine for the VPO-101 and compatible systems with a capacity of 5 rounds of 7.62x39 caliber.
A rechambered magazine for the VPO-101 and compatible systems with a capacity of 10 rounds of 7.62x39 caliber.
A magazine for the VPO-101 and compatible systems, manufactured by Molot, with a capacity of 5 rounds of 7.62x54 caliber.
A magazine for the VPO-101 and compatible systems, manufactured by Molot, with a capacity of 10 rounds of 7.62x54 caliber.
